1.description: This gilded banana badge was scored by sharing a lulz-worthy clip during April Fool’s week 2025.

1.title: Twitch Recap 2024
1.description: The Official Chat Badge of the Year. It takes hard work and KomodoHype to receive it. You should be proud to tell everyone you know about this.

message.body: TTBB is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: Please never make me do that jump ever again
Do you got any manga reccs
A man who can't recc on request is no man at all
Let me get home first and I'll ask again the signal here sucks on the road
I'm a passenger! I don't even know how to drive
I pay one of my employees to drive me
Yup it's directly in their job desc
Is this just a long save
This is definitely to floor 100 lol
Just full jump and you'll probably snap
barfy and I are NOT doing tuddies tuesday today, so i was like "SIGH, I guess I'll watch TTBB"
Even if you don't snap you're safe because you won't die
holy shit it's really been 3 and a half years since The Incident
right now i'm eating the chicken nuggets with the mustard on em
if you like mustard then yeah it's good
hun it's time for your daily 100 gates
for all intents and purposes dijon mustard is just mustard made with wine instead of vinegar
or wine made into vinegar, then used
standard mustard is just Mustard Seed, Vinegar, Water, Salt
i'd assume balsamic mustard is replace the vinegar with balsamic vinegar
Frank's Yellow Mustard is Mustard Seed, Water, Vinegar, Salt
and modifications of this come from changing either the Vinegar or adding extra stuff, like in the case of Siracha or Honey
so you can think of siracha mustard as just yellow mustard + siracha
well there's two types of mustard seed, which when made into mustard get called Yellow and Brown
everything that isn't just Yellow Mustard or Brown Mustard is a form of mustard + something else

I put honey mustard in C because every god damn time I get honey mustard from restaurants it's like RNG whether it taste like what I prefer because they all have wildly different tasting honey mustard and it's insane
Peanut Butter + Honey is a popular combination
Peanut Butter + Jelly is a popular combination
Mustard + Honey is a popular combination
I like the taste of honey mustard, I just don't like the inconsistencies of flavors
why I always take BBQ sauce over honey mustard because most of the time, no matter hwat, the bbq sauce tastes like bbq sauce
I guess the needle is hard enough to take 5k+ deaths?
i come back u come and you win????
this is hella a boss i would call william for

you are NOT clearing in 3 minutes

cause I dont tend to like reading themusually

is his whole body a hitbox
Just get the align for the downwards bullets 4Head
you have access to all 3 aligns
assuming it's the same as apple aligns, far left wall to stand between them on the left

if it was possible that'd be the spot

i dont know if you died to the ceiling bullets or a stray yellow shot
i bet the EX of this is the snow/rain/wind particles being real
ok so i looked at the bullet sprite in gamemaker
no boss bullets. just constant, nigh invisible barrage
the full sprite is 32x32, the hitbox is the full image, but it is precise
there are 5 pixels on the left, and 7 on the right
meaning between them is a gap of 12 pixels
meaning you can align through it
well ttbb. you know what you must do
it just isn't the left wall
also thats assuming its not rotated or scaled
TTBB has unleashed their 31 sternutation ChenMeh
you need to be standing at exactly x:62 or x:63, meaning you need the align of not the far left wall
either of the other walls on the left side will work
is what it looks like on the block
it just lines up perfectly to get you killed by the set green shots
upload that as the april fool version
but this is a world first clear

you didn't even reach the math phase yet

You have to turn off sticky keys

phase 1 has 100 hp, it is a killer
phase 2 has 1000 hp, it is not a killer

Kamilia 3 final boss Phase 3 has 666 hp
